products.name: Kiox 500
products.description: Big color smart-system display, 40% larger than Kiox 300; drops onto the same BDS3 mount. Smart system only - will not talk to pre-2024 BES2 bikes.

products.name: Purion 200
products.description: Compact all-in-one color display and remote for the Bosch smart system. The stock control unit on current Trek Verve+ and Allant+ - buy as replacement or spare. Smart system only.

products.name: Intuvia 100
products.description: Large easy-read display that pairs wirelessly with smart-system bikes - no rewiring. Smart system only, useless on BES2 bikes.

products.name: Kiox retrofit kit (BUI330)
products.description: Full color-display upgrade for PRE-smart (BES2, MY2014-2023) Bosch bikes: BUI330 head unit, separate remote, mount and 1500mm cable. Replaces Purion. Never fits smart-system bikes.

products.name: LED Remote (smart system)
products.description: Bar-mounted smart-system controller with charge LEDs; the hub other smart displays hang off. Replacement or cockpit-rebuild part. Smart system only.

products.name: SmartphoneGrip
products.description: Powered phone mount that turns your phone into the bike's display via the eBike Flow app; charges while you ride. Smart system only.

products.name: ConnectModule
products.description: GPS + SIM anti-theft tracking module for smart-system bikes (alarm, location, Flow+ subscription). Frame must have the mounting provision - dealer install.

products.name: PowerMore 250 range extender
products.description: 250Wh bottle-cage range extender, 3.3 lb. Smart system ONLY, and the bike's maker must have enabled it (MY23+ charge socket required) - check in the Flow app before buying.

products.name: PowerTube 750 horizontal (smart system)
products.description: 750Wh in-frame smart-system battery (BBP3775 horizontal). Spare or replacement for 750Wh smart bikes. Match mount orientation; never fits BES2 frames.

products.name: Compact Charger 2A (eBike System 2)
products.description: Small travel charger for PRE-smart (BES2) Bosch batteries - PowerPack and PowerTube. Oval plug. Will not charge smart-system batteries.

products.name: Charger 4A (smart system)
products.description: Fast 4A charger for Bosch smart-system batteries (round 4-pin plug). Roughly halves charge time vs the stock 2A. Will not charge BES2 batteries.

products.name: Charger 2A (smart system)
products.description: Compact 2A charger for smart-system batteries (BPC3210, round plug). Good second charger for the office. Not for BES2 bikes.

products.name: U2-710 spare battery (Turbo Vado/Como/Tero)
products.description: Genuine Specialized 710Wh downtube battery (part 98921-5634) for second-generation full-power Turbo Vado, Como and Tero. Spare or capacity upgrade.

products.name: EnergyPak Plus 250 range extender
products.description: 250Wh bottle-cage range extender for Giant E+ bikes with EnergyPak Smart battery, 7-pin charge socket and downtube bottle bosses (MY2020+). Charges with your original Smart Charger.

products.name: Kinekt 2.1 suspension seatpost
products.description: Parallelogram active-suspension seatpost with swappable springs - the biggest single comfort upgrade for a rigid-frame commuter. Comes in 27.2/30.9/31.6mm.

products.name: ShockStop suspension seatpost
products.description: 35mm-travel suspension seatpost that kills road chatter. 27.2mm shaft - larger seat tubes need a quality shim.

products.name: ShockStop suspension stem
products.description: Elastomer suspension stem that takes the sting out of your hands and wrists. Needs a standard 1-1/8in threadless steerer - not for integrated cockpits.

products.name: Cruise Control grips
products.description: Ergonomic wing lock-on grips for standard 22.2mm flat bars. Not for twist-shifter bikes.

products.name: GP1 Evo Single Twistshift grips
products.description: GP1 ergonomic grips with a shortened right grip for twist shifters (Rohloff/Nexus/Pinion style). The grip answer for hub-gear commuters.

products.name: Mini 2 e-bike headlight
products.description: Compact 235-lumen StVZO headlight that wires to the e-bike's light output (6V/12V DC variants). Clean OEM-grade lighting upgrade - dealer wiring check required.

products.name: Marathon E-Plus 28x2.15 (pair)
products.description: Schwalbe's toughest e-bike touring tire (Smart DualGuard) in 28x2.15 / 55-622 for 700c trekking e-bikes.

products.name: Big Ben Plus 28x2.15 (pair)
products.description: Balloon comfort tire with GreenGuard protection in 28x2.15 / 55-622. Smooths out city streets on 700c commuters.

products.name: Back-Roller 20L panniers (pair)
products.description: The benchmark waterproof pannier pair (2x20L) with QL2.1 hooks that fit 8-16mm rack rails. Commuter workhorse.

fitments.note: OEM display: 'The Gazelle V-shaped handlebar stem integrates the Bosch Kiox 300 display' (gazellebikes.com/en-us/ebikes/gazelle-eclipse-c380plus). Bosch: Kiox 300 is smart-system-only (help.bosch-ebike.com/us/help-center/ebw-kiox300-compatibility/asset-asf-00135).
2023 refresh ships Kiox 300 on the smart system: 'a new Kiox 300 display' with 625Wh battery (jclindbikes.com/gazelle-ultimate-c380-2023.html; gazellebikes.com). NEVER fits 2020-2022 BES2 Ultimates.

Gen 3 Verve+ 2 is Bosch smart system with Purion 200 (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-2-gen-3_4403). Bosch: 'Purion 200 is compatible with other displays and can be retrofitted alongside... Kiox 300, Kiox 500, or SmartphoneGrip' (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/purion200). Requires Kiox display holder. Never fits 2019-2023 BES2 Verve+ 2.

Verve+ 3 Gen 3 (2024+) is smart system with Purion 200 (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-3-gen-3_2801). Bosch Purion 200 page: retrofittable alongside Kiox 300 (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/purion200). Requires Kiox display holder.

Allant+ 7 Gen 2 is smart system w/ Purion 200 (trekchicago.com/product/trek-allant-7-gen-2-800075-1.htm; electricbikereport.com/trek-updates-allant-plus-line/), so Kiox 300 is compatible per Bosch - BUT MY2023 spans Gen 1 (BES2) and Gen 2. Verify the unit is smart system (round 4-pin charge plug / Flow app) before sale.

Current Medeo T9 is smart system with Purion 200 (gazellebikes.com/en-us/ebikes/gazelle-medeo-t9), so Kiox 300 is compatible per Bosch - but Gazelle's exact smart-system transition year is unverified. Confirm the unit is smart system first.

Direct upgrade: 'the Kiox 500 is a direct replacement for Kiox 300' on smart-system bikes, same mount (ebike24.com/blog/ebike-bosch-kiox-500-display-retrofit; help.bosch-ebike.com asset-asf-00135). Eclipse C380+ is smart system with Kiox 300 OEM.

2023+ Ultimate C380 is smart system with Kiox 300 OEM (jclindbikes.com/gazelle-ultimate-c380-2023.html); Kiox 500 is a direct swap on the same mount (help.bosch-ebike.com asset-asf-00135). Never fits 2020-2022 BES2 units.

Gen 3 (smart system, Purion 200). Bosch: Purion 200 'can be retrofitted alongside... Kiox 500' (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/purion200). Requires Kiox display holder. Never fits 2019-2023 BES2 Verve+ 2.
Smart system w/ Purion 200 (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-3-gen-3_2801); Bosch Purion 200 page lists Kiox 500 retrofit. Requires Kiox display holder.
Compatible with Gen 2 (smart system) per Bosch; MY2023 spans Gen 1 BES2 and Gen 2 smart. Verify generation on the unit before sale. Never fits 2020-2022.
Current Medeo T9 is smart system (gazellebikes.com); Kiox 500 smart-only per Bosch. Gazelle transition year unverified - confirm the unit is smart system.

OEM control unit on Verve+ 2 Gen 3: 'Purion 200... all-in-one color display' (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-2-gen-3_4403). Like-for-like replacement. Never fits 2019-2023 BES2 (those use the original Purion BUI210).
OEM control unit on Verve+ 3 Gen 3 (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-3-gen-3_2801; Trek dealer specs). Like-for-like replacement.
Gen 2 ships Purion 200 (trekchicago.com Allant+ 7 Gen 2 listing: 'Bosch Purion 200 controller... smart system'), but MY2023 spans Gen 1/Gen 2 - verify the unit is Gen 2 smart before sale.
Current Medeo T9 spec: 'Bosch Purion 200 LCD display' on the smart system (gazellebikes.com/en-us/ebikes/gazelle-medeo-t9). Transition year unverified - confirm smart system on the unit.

Smart system only: 'connected wirelessly to your eBike with the smart system' (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/intuvia100). Gen 3 is smart; confirm cockpit pairing config alongside the factory Purion 200 with a Bosch dealer.
Smart-system-only wireless display (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/intuvia100). Bike is smart; confirm pairing alongside factory Purion 200 with dealer.
Smart-system-only (Bosch). Gen 2 only - MY2023 spans BES2 Gen 1 too. Verify generation and pairing config before sale.
Smart-system-only (Bosch). 2023+ Ultimate is smart with Kiox 300; confirm Intuvia 100 pairing config for this cockpit with dealer.
Smart-system-only (Bosch). Gazelle smart transition year unverified - confirm the unit is smart system.
Smart-system-only (Bosch); Eclipse is smart. Kiox 300 lives in the integrated stem - confirm Intuvia 100 bar-mount pairing config with dealer.

Kit is 'compatible with all Bosch product series from model year 2014 (except Bosch Smart System products)' (horizonmicromobility.com Kiox retrofit kit BUI330 page). 2019-2023 Verve+ 2 = BES2 Active Line w/ Purion. Replaces Purion; dealer install recommended. NEVER fits 2024+ smart Verve+ 2.

Gen 1 Allant+ 7 = BES2 Performance Line CX w/ Purion, PowerTube 500 (electricbikereview.com/trek/allant-plus-7/). Kit covers all BES2 series MY2014+ (horizonmicromobility.com). Never fits Gen 2 smart (2023+).

Adventure Neo 4 is BES2 across its run: Bosch Active Line 40Nm, PowerTube 400, Purion (cannondale.com/en-us/bikes/electric/e-urban/adventure-neo/adventure-neo-4). Kit covers all BES2 series MY2014+ (horizonmicromobility.com).

Pre-refresh Ultimate C380 is believed BES2 Performance Line w/ Purion (2023 refresh moved to smart/Kiox 300 per jclindbikes.com), but we lack an explicit pre-2023 spec sheet. Verify BES2 (oval charge plug, no LED Remote) before sale.
Early Medeo T9 = BES2 Active Line Plus w/ Purion (electricbikereview.com/gazelle/medeo-t9-city-hmb/), but Gazelle's smart transition year is unverified. Verify BES2 on the unit before sale.

Bare BUI330 head unit only. These Purion-equipped BES2 bikes need the full Kiox retrofit kit (remote + mount + 1500mm cable) - the display alone will not connect. Sell the kit instead unless the bike already has a Kiox mount.
Bare head unit; Gen 1 Allant+ 7 has Purion - needs the full retrofit kit. Suitable alone only as a replacement on a bike already converted to Kiox. Never fits smart-system Gen 2.
BES2 bike (Purion OEM). Bare BUI330 needs the full retrofit kit to work; display-only purchase fits only already-converted bikes.
BES2-era bike; bare display needs the full retrofit kit, and the pre-2023 BES2 spec should be verified on the unit.
BES2-era bike; bare display needs the full retrofit kit, and Gazelle's smart transition year is unverified. Verify before sale.
OEM part: Verve+ 2 Gen 3 ships with the 'Bosch smart system LED remote' (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-2-gen-3_4403). Like-for-like replacement. Smart system only.
Smart-system bike; LED Remote is the smart-system controller, but this bike's cockpit is built around Purion 200 - confirm intended cockpit configuration with dealer before swapping.
Smart-system bike with Kiox 300 + factory remote; confirm which remote variant the Gazelle stem cockpit uses before selling a replacement.

Bosch: 'Purion 200 is compatible with other displays and can be retrofitted alongside... SmartphoneGrip' (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/purion200). Gen 3 = smart system w/ Purion 200. Never fits 2019-2023 BES2.
Smart system w/ Purion 200; Bosch Purion 200 page lists SmartphoneGrip retrofit (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/purion200).
Compatible with Gen 2 (smart, Purion 200) per Bosch; MY2023 spans BES2 Gen 1. Verify generation on the unit.
Smart-system only; current Medeo is smart w/ Purion 200 but transition year unverified. Verify on the unit.
Smart-system bike (Kiox 300 in integrated stem); SmartphoneGrip is smart-only per Bosch - confirm cockpit mounting alongside the Gazelle stem display.
Smart-system bike; confirm mounting alongside the stem-integrated Kiox 300 cockpit.

Smart system only; Bosch's Verve+ 2 Gen 3 page describes ConnectModule GPS/alarm (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-2-gen-3_4403). Retrofit requires the frame mounting provision + Flow+ - dealer confirm per unit.
Smart-system bike; ConnectModule retrofit depends on frame provision - dealer confirm (bosch-ebike.com/us/products/connectmodule).
Gen 2 smart only (MY2023 spans BES2 Gen 1); retrofit depends on frame provision - dealer confirm.
Smart-system years only; retrofit depends on frame provision - dealer confirm.
Smart-system only and Gazelle transition year unverified; retrofit depends on frame provision - dealer confirm.
Smart-system bike; retrofit depends on frame provision - dealer confirm.

BES2 bike (Active Line/Purion). Bosch: BES2 chargers charge all BES2 PowerPack/PowerTube batteries (help.bosch-ebike.com/en/help-center/ebw-powertubesbes2-range/asset-asf-00352); BES2 and smart-system components 'are not compatible with each other' (asset-asf-00515). NEVER for 2024+ smart Verve+ 2.
Gen 1 = BES2 PowerTube 500 (electricbikereview.com/trek/allant-plus-7/); BES2 chargers fit all BES2 batteries (Bosch asset-asf-00352). Never for Gen 2 smart (2023+).
BES2 bike (PowerTube 400, ships with Bosch 2A charger - cannondale.com spec). 4A BES2 charger is the fast-charge upgrade; fits all BES2 batteries (Bosch asset-asf-00352).
Believed BES2 era (2023 refresh went smart per jclindbikes.com). Verify oval BES2 charge plug on the unit before sale - smart-system batteries cannot use this charger (Bosch asset-asf-00515).
BES2 era believed 2019-2023 but Gazelle's smart transition year unverified. Verify oval BES2 plug on the unit (Bosch asset-asf-00515).

BES2 bike; Compact 2A is 'specifically for eBike System 2 and not compatible with Bosch Smart System from 2022 onwards' (clevercycles.com/products/bosch-2-amp-charger; Bosch asset-asf-00352). Never for 2024+ smart.
Gen 1 BES2 PowerTube 500; BES2 chargers fit all BES2 batteries (Bosch asset-asf-00352). Never for Gen 2 smart.
The OEM charger: Cannondale spec lists 'Bosch 2A charger' with PowerTube 400 (cannondale.com Adventure Neo 4 page). Like-for-like replacement.
Believed BES2 era; verify oval BES2 charge plug on the unit before sale.
BES2 era believed but transition year unverified; verify oval BES2 plug on the unit.

Gen 3 = smart system (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-2-gen-3_4403). Bosch: 'The 2A Charger, the 4A Charger and the 12A Charger are the chargers for your eBike with the smart system'; older-generation batteries cannot use them (help.bosch-ebike.com/en/help-center/asset-asf-00671). NEVER for 2019-2023 BES2.
Smart-system bike (bosch-ebike.com/us/ebikes/trek/verve-3-gen-3_2801); smart chargers 2A/4A/12A per Bosch asset-asf-00671.
Smart-system bike (Bosch Performance Line Speed, PowerTube 750, Kiox 300 - gazellebikes.com); smart chargers per Bosch asset-asf-00671. Faster charge for the big 750Wh pack.
2023+ = smart system w/ Kiox 300, 625Wh (jclindbikes.com); smart chargers per Bosch asset-asf-00671. Never for 2020-2022 BES2 units.
Gen 2 = smart system, but MY2023 spans Gen 1 BES2. Verify round 4-pin smart charge plug on the unit before sale (Bosch asset-asf-00671).
Current Medeo is smart system but transition year unverified; verify round 4-pin smart plug on the unit.
Smart-system Gen 3; Bosch smart chargers are 2A/4A/12A (asset-asf-00671). Never for 2019-2023 BES2.
Smart-system bike; Bosch asset-asf-00671.
Smart-system bike; Bosch asset-asf-00671. Note: slow charger for a 750Wh pack - fine as a spare/office charger.
2023+ smart-system Ultimate (jclindbikes.com); Bosch asset-asf-00671. Never for 2020-2022 BES2 units.
MY2023 spans Gen 1 BES2 / Gen 2 smart; verify round 4-pin smart plug on the unit.
Smart transition year unverified; verify round 4-pin smart plug on the unit.

Smart-system bike, and Bosch says 'in principle, all bikes with the Smart System are compatible' - BUT the OEM must have enabled the option, the bike needs the MY23+ charge socket and mounting points, and the connect cable is separate (horizonmicromobility.com/blogs/micromobility-blog/bosch-powermore-range-extender-250). Confirm in Flow app: Settings > My eBike > Components.
Smart-system years only. OEM enablement + MY23 charge socket + mounts required (Bosch/Horizon guidance); confirm in Flow app before sale.
Gen 3 is smart system, but PowerMore requires OEM-enabled option + MY23 socket + bottle mounts; confirm in Flow app. NEVER fits 2019-2023 BES2.
Smart-system bike; OEM enablement + MY23 socket + mounts required - confirm in Flow app.
Gen 2 smart only (MY2023 spans BES2 Gen 1); plus OEM enablement + MY23 socket + mounts required - confirm in Flow app.
Smart years only (transition unverified); OEM enablement + MY23 socket + mounts required - confirm in Flow app.

OEM battery is the 750Wh smart-system PowerTube ('750Wh, Bosch Smart System' - electricavenuebike.com Eclipse listing; gazellebikes.com). Confirm mount orientation before sale: horizontal BBP3775 vs vertical BBP3770 are different SKUs.

OEM battery of the 2022+ Vado 4.0 (710Wh - electricbikereview.com/specialized/turbo-vado-4-0/). Part 98921-5634 'compatible with all Turbo Tero and second-generation Turbo Vado and Turbo Como models' (bikefirstgreet.com; lordgunbicycles.co.uk).
2026 Vado is a redesigned platform (new frame - bikeradar.com review); Specialized still lists 710Wh, but confirm the 2026 battery part number matches U2-710 before sale.
OEM battery: Como 4.0 = 'Turbo Full Power 2.0 motor and 710Wh battery' (electricbikereview.com/specialized/turbo-como-4-0/); U2-710 covers all 2nd-gen Como (bikefirstgreet.com).
Confirm 2026 Como 4.0 is still the second-generation platform with the U2 battery before sale.

Como 3.0 ships with 530Wh (electricbikereview.com/specialized/turbo-como-3-0/); vendors state U2-710 fits 'all second-generation Como' (bikefirstgreet.com), which would make this a 530-to-710 capacity upgrade - have a Specialized dealer confirm the swap on this model before promising it.

Giant/Liv requirements: MY2020+ bike with 7-pin charge socket, EnergyPak Smart battery, and downtube bottle bosses with extra openings (liv-cycling.com/us/how-to-install-energypak-plus-range-extender). Explore E+ 4 has EnergyPak Smart 500 (ebike24.com/giant-explore-e-plus-4) - confirm the 7-pin socket and frame openings on the specific model year.

2026 Explore E+ 2 is the new 800Wh platform (giant-bicycles.com/gb/explore-eplus-2-2026); EnergyPak Plus compatibility with the new platform is not yet on Giant's published list - confirm with Giant before sale.

Enviolo twist shifter on this bike; Ergon names Rohloff/Nexus/Pinion twist systems, not Enviolo - confirm fit before sale.

Gen 2 frame/fenders changed; 2.4in should still clear but confirm fender clearance on the unit.
Stock tires are 2.35in Schwalbe on 27.5 (gazellebikes.com); 2.4 is marginally wider - confirm fender clearance.
Stock 27.5x2.3; 2.4 close but confirm fender/frame clearance.

Stock 27.5x2.0 (Bosch bike page: 'wide 2 inch puncture-resistant tires'); 2.15 slightly wider - confirm fender clearance.
